One of the things I like about this game is the design of the monsters. The horror has a massive impact when the monsters aren't scary and this game has an impact too, but in a good way. The game is a blast to play with friends but there's one thing this game comes short on, the jump scares. The jump scares would be scary it's just that they're glitched, when you get caught by a monster through the jumpscare they're extremely small and due to the way quests lenses are you can't see most of their body seeing as the lenses can't really go that far to the middle. This is in my opinion the worse problem compared to the latter but the latter is still a pretty big problem. The music is really loud and just annoying, this wouldn't be a problem but there isn't a way to turn it down/off. Without these problems this game would be a solid 5. If the dev can see this I just want to say you've made a banger of a game and me and my friends love it.

Honestly I came into this game because of the Gorilla tag game award thingy not expecting much, but this game is like, really good! Might be one of the best gtag horror games, The monsters were scary and pretty good quality, and the maps look really nice! You even get free cosmetics, which I love! The only issue is the jumpscares, sometimes the jumpscare would appear seperately in both eyes, like what i mean is the jumpscares would appear FULLY in each eye goggle thing, so the jumpscares were basically just 2 jumpscares. Also occasionally id get stuck in a jumpscare loop, but it was easy to get out of.  Honestly this game is just great! I would really reccomend this to anyone who likes gorilla tag style horror games! Its very fun! And the players are pretty nice too from my experience, noone was mean to me!
Scarier then Animal Company Scarier Then Big Scary

This game is really fun but the thing is the beginning when u choose which one play or the chase the music gives me a bad vibe and makes me want to delete the game. Also the lava in volcano map u have to touch it twice to respawn.

reviews.review_title: Lots of improvement! Just add turning
reviews.review_description: I played this game when it was on itch. Io and I see A LOT of improvement from the original but I just need one thing added. Stick turning, and that because I play in a small place and having to turn and risk hurting myself from punching a wall is a high chance, in fact I hit my fan... Somehow.... So all I ask is to add stick turning it could be snap or smooth but I just need that... Maybe adjustable sensitivity?

reviews.review_title: Best GTAG horror game I’ve played!
reviews.review_description:
It’s actually scary! The jumpscares could be better, but that doesn’t matter when you game is practically perfect! 

I also love the free cosmetics, it’s really nice. 

The monsters are actually SCARY for once! Geez, I haven’t said that in a while. 
 
In all, your game is EXCELLENT! Don’t give up on it, it’s the best horror game out there!
